/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread CMakeFiles/testnative.dir/testnative.c.o CMakeFiles/testnative.dir/testnativex11.c.o CMakeFiles/testnative.dir/testnativewayland.c.o "CMakeFiles/testnative.dir/__/wayland-generated-protocols/xdg-shell-protocol.c.o" CMakeFiles/sdltests_utils.dir/testutils.c.o -o testnative  ../libSDL3_test.a ../libSDL3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libwayland-client.so
